title: retrieval_config — one source the stream watches
description: A retrieval source as data: what tools/fetch_sources.py executes (arxiv, rss, hackernews) or what the delegated web sweep is asked to find (websweep — landed via tools/land_stories.py). Refining the stream is a data edit, never a code edit. Any number of configs may be active; a weekly run executes them all, one run record each. Deactivate rather than delete — runs reference their config forever.

query.description: Per source: arxiv → the API search_query; rss → the feed URL; hackernews → the Algolia full-text query; websweep → the brief the delegate sweeps against.

window_days.description: Default trailing window when a fetch isn't given explicit dates.

retmax.description: Cap on items taken per run.

active.description: The weekly run executes every active config.
